description_long: This rifle features a striking, modern design with a vibrant color palette of teal, purple, and magenta, adorned with large rose motifs along the stock and receiver. The stock is fixed and solid, providing stability, and the barrel is long and slender, suitable for precision shooting. The receiver and fore-end are decorated with the same floral pattern, giving the weapon a unique, artistic appearance. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, and there is no visible scope or advanced sighting system. The magazine is internal, integrated into the body, and the muzzle is plain with no additional device attached. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, enhancing the vividness of the colors and patterns.
description: A visually striking rifle with a fixed stock, long barrel, and vibrant floral patterns in teal, purple, and magenta. It features iron sights, an internal magazine, and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and a hint of the colorful stock.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full length of the rifle, the floral patterns, and the fixed stock with rose motifs.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, emphasizing the rounded stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the floral design, the fixed stock, and the long, slender barrel.
